summary: Completed backend testing of 5 improvements for AppDrElmer - Sistema de Gestão Rural. All 15 tests passed successfully.
passed_tests: MELHORIA 1b: DELETE /api/categorias/{id} without force returns 409 with despesas count
MELHORIA 1b: DELETE /api/categorias/{id}?force=true cascades and deletes linked despesas
MELHORIA 1b: DELETE /api/categorias/{id} without dependencies succeeds without force
MELHORIA 1b: DELETE /api/categorias/{id} returns 404 for non-existent categoria
MELHORIA 1a: DELETE /api/animais/{id} without force returns 409 with movimentacoes/eventos/filhos counts
MELHORIA 1a: DELETE /api/animais/{id}?force=true cascades (deletes movimentacoes/eventos, unlinks filhos)
MELHORIA 1a: DELETE /api/animais/{id} without dependencies succeeds without force
MELHORIA 1a: DELETE /api/animais/{id} returns 404 for non-existent animal
MELHORIA 2: GET /api/animais/{id}/filhos returns list of offspring
MELHORIA 2: GET /api/animais/{id}/filhos returns 404 for non-existent animal
MELHORIA 2: GET /api/animais/{id}/filhos returns empty list when no offspring
MELHORIA 2b: GET /api/animais/{id}/historico includes filhos and total_filhos fields
MELHORIA 2b: GET /api/animais/{id}/historico includes genitora when animal has mother
MELHORIA 5: POST /api/calendario-vacinacao/{tipo}/sincronizar-lembretes?desativar=false (dry-run) lists orphans without deactivating
seed_data_creation: Test data created and cleaned up automatically during tests using unique prefixes
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 improvements have been tested and verified working: (1a) DELETE /api/animais/{id} with cascade delete for dependencies, (1b) DELETE /api/categorias/{id} with cascade delete for despesas, (2) GET /api/animais/{id}/filhos endpoint, (2b) GET /api/animais/{id}/historico now includes filhos/total_filhos/genitora fields, (5) POST /api/calendario-vacinacao/{tipo}/sincronizar-lembretes for orphan lembrete management. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_melhorias.py can be reused for regression testing.
